items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding the expiration and status lifecycle (draft/sent/accepted/expired/rejected). However, the evidence provided does not explicitly demonstrate that these statuses are being tracked or managed within the system. The prior steps do not include any checks or validations that confirm the implementation of this lifecycle, leading to an inconclusive result.
